reasoning: Blends the precision and clarity of modern SaaS (Linear, Vercel) with warm, approachable tones ('job-portal warmth') to foster trust for job seekers. Uses high contrast monochrome with sharp, vibrant accents instead of generic purples.

hierarchy.overline: text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-orange-600 font-semibold

layout.spacing_philosophy: Generous. p-8 to p-12 for containers, gap-6 to gap-8 for grids.

patterns.hero: Subtle dot grid background (radial-gradient), centered wide layout, large typography, glassmorphic search bar floating above.
patterns.dashboard: Control Room Grid. Base grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4. gap-6. Density for data correlation.
patterns.jobs_grid: List view heavily inspired by Workable/Vercel. Left: Job Title & Tags. Right: Location & Meta. 1px borders, hover-lift.
patterns.ai_resume: Bento Grid (Tetris) for the analyzer results. Wide spans for overall score, tall spans for skill gaps. Uses 'Tracing Beam' border effect on the upload zone.

buttons.primary: bg-orange-600 text-white hover:bg-orange-700 transition-colors rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-stone-200 text-stone-900 hover:bg-stone-50 transition-colors rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium shadow-sm
buttons.ai_action: bg-emerald-600 text-white hover:bg-emerald-700 transition-colors rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(5,150,105,0.3)]

components.cards: bg-white border border-stone-200 rounded-xl p-6 transition-all hover:border-stone-300 hover:shadow-md
components.glass_header: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/40 shadow-sm
components.inputs: bg-stone-50 border border-stone-200 text-stone-900 rounded-md focus:ring-2 focus:ring-orange-600/20 focus:border-orange-600 transition-all
components.badges: bg-stone-100 text-stone-700 border border-stone-200 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium

office_culture.description: Modern diverse professionals in an open office setting. Use for 'Employer' CTA section.
Group of people collaborating at a wooden table. Use for 'About Us' or 'Culture' blocks.

accessibility_and_interactions.focus_states: All interactive elements must have focus:ring-2 focus:ring-orange-600/50 focus:outline-none.
accessibility_and_interactions.hover_states: Cards lift (-translate-y-1). Buttons shift color slightly. Links use underline-offset-4.
accessibility_and_interactions.data_testids: MANDATORY on all buttons, links, form inputs, menus, and key information points (e.g., data-testid='apply-job-button').

tech_stack_rules.ui_library: Use Shadcn/UI for complex interactive components (Dialog, Tabs, Select). Use pure HTML/Tailwind for layouts and cards where Shadcn feels too rigid.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard Tailwind CSS classes. No custom CSS unless strictly required for dot grid backgrounds (e.g., `bg-[radial-gradient(#e5e7eb_1px,transparent_1px)]`).
Ensure 'Outfit' font is loaded from Google Fonts for headings, and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body.
For the AI Resume Analyzer, implement a 'Tracing Beam' effect using Framer Motion or simple CSS animations for the dropzone border, and highlight the 'Score' in the emerald-600 accent color.
Implement the Header with Glassmorphism (bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl).
Replace dummy names with media testimonials provided in the JSON. Never use placeholder services.
Never use generic purple gradients. Stick strictly to the monochrome + Orange/Emerald palette for 'SaaS precision + Job Portal Warmth'.
Data test IDs must be kebab-case and role-based.
